hooks.command: echo '🔧 Initializing project...' && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --prefer-offline || echo '⚠️  Warning: pnpm install failed'

if echo "$CLAUDE_BASH_COMMAND" | grep -qE '\bgit commit\b'; then PROJECT_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd) && cd "$PROJECT_ROOT" && echo '🔍 Pre-commit checks...' && echo '  ✓ Running lint...' && pnpm lint 2>&1 && echo '  ✓ Running typecheck...' && pnpm typecheck 2>&1 && echo '  ✓ Running tests...' && pnpm test 2>&1 && echo '✅ All checks passed!' || (echo '❌ Pre-commit checks failed! Fix errors before committing.' && exit 1); fi
